## Summary

Brief description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `catalog/skills.yaml` (if adding or modifying skill metadata).
- [ ] Ran `python tools/catalog/sync_catalog.py --write`.
- [ ] Verified `python tools/validation/validate_repository.py` passes cleanly.
- [ ] Verified `python tools/packaging/verify_distribution.py` passes cleanly.
- [ ] All unit, contract, and repository tests pass (`python -m pytest -q`).
